text.title: ts-strict-isolated Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ts-strict-isolated as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Disabling strict for one file via // @ts-nocheck instead of fixing the type error.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The escape hatch turns an entire file into untyped JS. Use // @ts-expect-error: <ticket> on the single line, or fix the type properly. Agents will copy @ts-nocheck patterns once they see one example.

failure-mode.description: Importing across packages by relative path (../../shared/src/foo.ts) instead of by package name with a references entry.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Bypasses the project reference graph — tsc cannot determine build order, editors cannot do cross-package go-to-definition. Treat each package as an opaque module identifiable by its package.json name.
